calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: SD-056 action-contrastive matched-entropy FP-2 falsifier (GAP-A, A_only)
items.note: GAP-A behavioural diversity isolation Theory 1 / Layer A load-bearing falsifier. Tests whether SD-056 (ree-v3 main 041a974 + V3-EXQ-613 PASS) propagates per-candidate z_world variance through to action-class diversity. A_only design -- MECH-341 (Layer B) OFF, MECH-313 (Layer C) OFF. Plan-of-record: REE_assembly/evidence/planning/behavioral_diversity_isolation_plan.md GAP-A node.

items.title: MECH-295 drive->liking->approach cascade Tier-1 retest (post-library-rebuild)
items.note: goal_pipeline:GAP-4 closure-load-bearing experiment. Supersedes V3-EXQ-490g (FAILed 2026-05-21 on the un-rebuilt library; agent.dacc=None across arms despite gap4_operating=True per the 2026-05-29 V3-EXQ-490g-cohort autopsy Fork A). Runs under the rebuilt Tier-1 library (commit-pending): (1) cfg.use_dacc=True is now unconditional in build_config so both arms get dACC instantiation, and (2) evaluate_tier1_cohort C3_lift_vs_baseline default metric is goal_norm_peak delta vs baseline (substrate-side, cross-claim-comparable; range 0.09-0.36 observed on 483c/524a). approach_commit_rate retained as a legacy debug knob (saturates at 1.0 in OFF_OFF baseline under drive_floor=0.9 + goal_stream + reef). 2 arms x 3 seeds (ARM_0_legacy_collapsed vs ARM_1_gap4_operating). Acceptance: C1 bridge_cue_fires + C2 dacc_bias_nonzero_steps + C3 approach_commit_steps + C4 goal_active_fraction + C3_lift_vs_baseline on goal_norm_peak delta (TIER1_GOAL_NORM_PEAK_DELTA=0.01) -- ARM_1 must beat ARM_0 on 2/3 seeds. PASS routes goal_pipeline:GAP-4 toward closure. FAIL-with-C2-only routes to /diagnose-errors on SD-032b dACC bundle population (see script docstring for full interpretation grid). Dry-run smoke 2026-05-29: wiring intact, acceptance dict populates goal_norm_peak_delta metric correctly, dry-run outcome FAIL at single seed (expected). experiment_purpose=evidence. Plan-of-record: REE_assembly/evidence/planning/goal_pipeline_plan.md GAP-4 row + REE_assembly/evidence/planning/failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-490g-cohort_2026-05-29.md Fork A.

items.title: SD-037 broadcast override GAP-4 Tier-1 retest with PAG/override_signal C2
items.note: SD-037 broadcast override 4-arm factorial (GABA suppress ON/OFF x broadcast override ON/OFF) under rebuilt GAP-4 Tier-1 library. Supersedes V3-EXQ-483c (FAILed 2026-05-21; autopsy: C2_dacc_bias=0 across all 12 runs because agent.dacc=None; C3_lift on approach_commit_rate hit OFF_OFF ceiling 1.0). 483d redesign per 2026-05-24 autopsy + 2026-05-29 cluster autopsy Fork A: (a) C2 replaced with override_signal_nonzero_steps (counts steps where broadcast_override.override_signal > 1e-3 in ON arms; OFF arms have broadcast_override=None so signal is 0 by construction -- directly measures SD-037's primary PAG pathway, not the dACC secondary), (b) C3_lift replaced with goal_norm_peak delta vs baseline (TIER1_GOAL_NORM_PEAK_DELTA=0.01 per-seed), (c) extra_config={use_dacc:True} explicit on every arm (redundant with the rebuilt library default but kept for clarity per 483d docstring). 4 arms x 3 seeds. Acceptance: C1 bridge_cue_fires + C2 override_signal_nonzero_steps>=10 + C3 approach_commit_steps + C4 goal_active_fraction on >=2/3 seeds, PLUS C3_lift_vs_baseline on goal_norm_peak. Dry-run smoke 2026-05-29 at 1 seed: OFF_ON + ON_ON PASS individual verdicts (override_signal C2 firing as designed); OFF_OFF + ON_OFF FAIL (no broadcast_override -- expected). Per-claim direction: SD-037 supports on PASS / weakens on FAIL; MECH-280, MECH-281 unknown (PAG wiring confirmed by 483b 1.875x release ratio; this experiment does not test those directly). Plan-of-record: REE_assembly/evidence/planning/failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-483c_2026-05-23.md + failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-490g-cohort_2026-05-29.md Fork A.

items.title: INV-074 crystallization necessity test (re-queue of V3-EXQ-610 with corrected runtime estimate)
items.note: Re-queue of V3-EXQ-610 (ran 2026-05-27T18:05:04Z on DLAPTOP-4.local, runner-classified ERROR via exit code -15 SIGTERM after actual_secs=47729.4 / 13.25h vs 180min estimate; no on-disk manifest, no code crash). Predecessor ran ARM_0_control to completion across all 3 seeds (verified ep 2500/2500 phase=3 log lines), then started ARM_1_test seed=42 and reached ep 2100/2500 phase=3 before SIGTERM. Script byte-identical to predecessor except EXPERIMENT_TYPE/QUEUE_ID/SUPERSEDES updated and stdout tags refreshed to [V3-EXQ-610a]; manifest now carries supersedes='V3-EXQ-610' so governance can mark the predecessor manifest superseded (no predecessor manifest exists; supersession is for queue-side traceability). estimated_minutes=800 (~13.5h) calibrated to predecessor actual_secs. Per IGW-20260529-030. Smoke 2026-05-29T06:25Z PASS (5 eps/arm/seed, ARM_0 + ARM_1 wiring intact, verdict line emitted). Substrate dependency MECH-341 landed 2026-05-27 commit 547faa3.

items.title: Phase 3 E2E smoke (verdict sentinel fix retry)
items.note: V3-EXQ-612b ran fine on cloud-2 but the script lacked the verdict: PASS stdout sentinel so the runner classified ERROR and skipped report_result. Script now prints verdict: PASS.
